_description: BTC Phase-Aware Seasonality Table (Month x Cycle Phase). Based on historical BTC cycle analysis 2011-2025.

January.description: Reversal start; green but volatile, often recovering from year-end dip

February.description: Strong recovery rally, momentum building from January reversal

March.description: Continuation, moderate gains, consolidation after Feb surge

April.description: Historically strongest month in bull markets, breakout territory

May.description: Sell in May effect weakened in crypto, mild consolidation

June.description: Seasonal weakness, profit taking after Q1-Q2 rally

July.description: Summer recovery, historically strong in bull years

August.description: Low volume summer doldrums, sideways action

September.description: Historically weakest month across all markets, BTC included

October.description: Uptober — strongest month historically, Q4 rally ignition

November.description: Bull continuation, FOMO builds, strong momentum

December.description: Mixed — profit taking vs year-end rally, volatile close

January.description: Deep red; continuation of sell-off from previous year

February.description: Dead cat bounce, brief relief rally

March.description: Resumption of downtrend after Feb relief, capitulation risk

April.description: Flat to slightly negative, bear market grinding lower

May.description: Severe sell-off month in bear markets, capitulation events

June.description: Worst month in bear markets, forced liquidations, cascading failures

July.description: Relief rally after June capitulation, bottom fishing begins

August.description: Sideways grind, low volume, exhaustion of sellers

September.description: Seasonal weakness compounded by bear sentiment

October.description: Early signs of stabilization, smart money accumulation begins

November.description: Late bear capitulation events (FTX Nov 2022, Mt Gox aftermath)

December.description: Tax loss selling meets early accumulation, bottoming process

January.description: Post-bear optimism begins, early recovery signals

February.description: Momentum building, smart money positioning intensifies

March.description: Consolidation after initial recovery, testing support levels

April.description: Breakout attempts, first major moves above resistance

May.description: Retracement after April strength, healthy pullback

June.description: Range-bound, building base for next leg up

August.description: Low volatility, coiling before move, Bollinger squeeze

September.description: Seasonal dip even in accumulation, shaking out weak hands

October.description: Breakout month, transition to markup phase often begins here

November.description: Confirmation of new uptrend, volume surge

December.description: Year-end positioning for new cycle, institutional entries

January.description: Final push higher, retail FOMO at peak, euphoric sentiment

February.description: First signs of exhaustion, momentum divergences appear

March.description: Correction from overextension, first scare for latecomers

April.description: Dead cat bounce / second peak attempt, classic double top setup

May.description: Sharp reversal, historically marks distribution climax events

June.description: Cascading sells, reality check, support levels breaking

July.description: Relief rally, hopium that worst is over

August.description: Lower highs confirming, trend change solidifying

September.description: Acceleration of selling, fund redemptions, forced selling

October.description: False hope, failed rally attempts, transition to markdown

November.description: Full transition to markdown, capitulation events

December.description: Tax loss selling amplifies decline, year-end despair

_mapping_to_rudy_filters.ACCUMULATION: Prime entry zone — all entry filters should be watched closely
_mapping_to_rudy_filters.MARKUP: Hold and ride — trailing stops active, no new entries after mid-phase
_mapping_to_rudy_filters.DISTRIBUTION: Tighten stops, reduce position size, watch for exit signals
_mapping_to_rudy_filters.MARKDOWN: No entries — survival mode, capital preservation priority
